title: Assistant Store Manager - Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises:
Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises!
